summary: BANGKOK, THAILAND, April 20, 2026 - Federal Express Corporation, one of the world's largest express transportation companies, today announced the addition of eight new zero-tailpipe emissions electric...

headline: Amazon, USPS and the risk of a widening delivery divide in rural America
summary: The new deal between Amazon and the U.S. Postal Service has many implications, maybe none greater than what it means for package delivery to rural Americans.
